title: Jackpot Admiring You
description: Replaces Hakari's Jackpot music to Admiring You
body:
Upon hitting Jackpot in ImNotHuragan's Cursed Fate mod, instead of playing Tripping on Love..

Jackpot will now play Admiring You! this way you can blast your opponent's ears with lore accurate music while chaining infinite JACKPOOOOTS!
